title: Silky Adventurous Spanish Goose Fat Stir-fry
description: A silky and adventurous Spanish dish featuring goose fat, infused with smoke for a unique twist, served as a raw-friendly dinner option.

ingredients.name: Goose Fat
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is properly smoked and safe for use in cooking.

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.amount: 1 large each color: red, green, yellow

instructions: Place the goose fat in a shallow dish and place it in an oven preheated at 428°F (220°C) for about 20 minutes until smoking.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Remove the skewered goose fat from the oven to cool slightly. Once cooled, use a wooden spoon or tongs to break it into smaller pieces.
Add minced garlic to the wok with the onions and cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Gradually add chopped bell peppers into the wok, stirring continuously to prevent burning. Cook until soft, about 3-4 minutes.
Fold in the cooled goose fat pieces and continue cooking for an additional minute. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a main dish or side, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
